[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001110110 5
1 001101010 4
2 011110010 5
3 001011101 5
4 111100100 5
5 101110111 7
6 100101110 5
7 001110100 4

12 21 101111110 7
23 32 001110110 5 match 0
34 43 001101010 4 match 1
45 54 011111010 6
56 65 011011111 7
67 76 111100111 7
70 07 101110111 7 match 5

13 31 100101110 5 match 6
24 42 001111100 5

46 64 011101111 7
